prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Find all Java source files in apache/kafka that implement the inter-broker replication protocol: the ReplicaFetcherThread, the LeaderEpochFileCache, the LogStartOffset tracking, and the ISR (in-sync replica) shrink/expand mechanism.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the apache-kafka-ecosystem fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Find all Java source files in apache/kafka that implement the inter-broker replication protocol: the ReplicaFetcherThread, the LeaderEpochFileCache, the LogStartOffset tracking, and the ISR (in-sync replica) shrink/expand mechanism.
